Interface ITerrainBuilder

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control terrain to raster conversion.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4FEAF55C-10CB-4B34-81AF-D5788F231EC0")]
public interface ITerrainBuilder

Properties

TerrainToRasterArguments

The parameters controlling terrain to raster properties built by this raster type.

ITerrainToRasterFunctionArguments TerrainToRasterArguments { get; set; }

Property Value
